case_title: ANATOLE BRATOFF VS. VALERIE H. LEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY BRATOFF, ANATOLE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($59 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED FEB-16-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, MATTTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION (NO EXHIBIT).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRATOFF, ANATOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H. $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,709.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BRATOFF, ANATOLE ASSIGNED TO JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,441.17 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CALAVERAS COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,452.41 ACCRUED INTEREST, $730.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRATOFF, ANATOLE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,496.42 ACCRUED INTEREST, $955.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H.

FILED ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT. FILED BY ASSIGNEE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,612.74 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H.
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRATOFF, ANATOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, VALERIE H. $3,366.74 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,366.74
